instructions: Review entries, then set include_on_site to true. Run: python scripts/generate_html.py

vulnerabilities.title: Microsoft Microsoft
vulnerabilities.name: Microsoft Exchange Server Cross-Site Scripting Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.description: Microsoft Exchange Server contains a cross-site scripting vulnerability during web page generation in Outlook Web Access and when certain interaction conditions are met, arbitrary JavaScript can be executed in the browser context.
vulnerabilities.short_description: Microsoft Exchange Server contains a cross-site scripting vulnerability during web page generation in Outlook Web...
vulnerabilities.fix: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable.
